features: Event ready package featuring 50 TitanPRO Resin Folding Chairs, 2 folding chair dollies and 2 straps to extra security.
Perfect solution for easy transport and storage of your wedding chairs.
A perfect bundle package for smaller event venues, this pack of 50 commercial-grade resin folding chairs comes with 2 dollies and 2 straps to securely transport the chairs and store them too.

TitanPROâ„˘ Resin Folding ChairWhen you buy our TitanPROâ„˘ Resin Folding Chairs in bulk, not only are you get getting free shipping, you're getting commercial-grade quality, premier wedding chairs at a wholesale price.
Each chair looks identical to traditonal wood folding chairs but with new age performance.
The resin material is 100% virgin polypropylene with UV protectants and carries a robust weight capacity of 1000 lbs. while only weighing 10.5 pounds itself.

These Resin Folding Chairs have a built in nesting design that allows them to stack neatly and securely as high as 25 on a dolly like the one in this bundle or as high are you're comfortably with on the floor.

Lightweight, easy to move and even easier to clean, if you're looking for a folding wedding chair package, look no further than our TitanPROâ„˘ Resin Folding Chairs that perform long after the party is over.
Folding Chair DollyIf you're looking to preserve floor space while also making the set up and break down of events a little easier then you absolutely need a Folding Chair Dolly.

After a few minutes assembling the dolly, the 2 fixed wheels and 2 swivel wheels will have you and your employees moving in and out of tight spots like a young Jacques Cousteau manoeuvering through the Mediterranean.

Folding Chair Dolly can carry up to 600 lbs. what makes it a dream to match in this bundle is the ability to carry 25 Resin Folding Chairs each without adding any additional floor space that will be taken up.

At only 44'' long and 19'' wide, that's about the only space that'll be taken up on the floor, even with Resin Folding Chairs stacked on top!How Much Space Will You Need?The good news is that if you can imagine your favorite riding lawn mower backed into a spot in your warehouse, then you'll have ample space for this bundle.
The better news is that all these items ship free with one click of the mouse!
